name: Cola Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, combine the salt, pepper, and garlic powder; rub over the surface of the roast.
3. In a Dutch oven, heat the oil until hot and brown the roast on both sides.
4. Transfer the roast to a roasting pan.
5. Combine all the remaining ingredients in a separate bowl.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the roast.
7. Cover and roast for 2 1/2 to 3 hours until tender.
